ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the employee is assigned */,
  "brain" INTEGER /* Cognitive capability score (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "muscle" INTEGER /* Physical capability score (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "heart" INTEGER /* Emotional capability score (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "starting_wage" REAL /* Starting wage of the employee */,
  "regular_hours" INTEGER /* Number of regular working hours per week */,
  "supervisor_hours" INTEGER /* Number of supervisor hours per week */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the store */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager (for quick reference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the manager is responsible for */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager oversees */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., cognitive, physical, emotional) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric (e.g., supervisor, self-assessment, peer review) */,
  "metric_target" REAL /* Target value for the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work schedule */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the schedule is associated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the schedule */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., active, cancelled) */,
  "shift_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shift type */,
  "hours_worked" INTEGER /* Actual hours worked during the shift */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Overtime hours worked during the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_schedules_shift_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shift_type_id") REFERENCES shift_types ("shift_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_schedules_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shift_types" (
  "shift_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift type */,
  "shift_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the shift type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shift type */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the shift type */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the shift type */,
  "overtime_policy" TEXT /* Overtime policy for the shift type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance goal */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the goal is associated with */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of performance goal (e.g., cognitive, physical, emotional) */,
  "goal_value" REAL /* Value of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the goal */,
  "goal_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance goal (e.g., supervisor, self-assigned) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the goal (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_goals_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the feedback is associated with */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given for the performance (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., supervisor, peer, self-assessment) */,
  "improvement_areas" TEXT /* Areas for improvement suggested in the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_feedback_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_history" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation change */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the change is associated with */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "new_wage" REAL /* New wage after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., promotion, performance review) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the change */,
  "previous_wage" REAL /* Previous wage before the change */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the new wage */,
  "review_cycle" TEXT /* Review cycle (e.g., annual, bi-annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the role (e.g., 1 for basic, 5 for admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
